scripts.build:wasm: cd crates/convolve-core && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../../packages/convolve-wasm/src/wasm --out-name convolve_core
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build -w @takana-labs/convolve-wasm && npm run build -w @takana-labs/convolve-demo
scripts.test:ts: npm run build:wasm && npm run build -w @takana-labs/convolve-wasm && npm run test -w @takana-labs/convolve-wasm
scripts.test:site: node --test tests/site-config.test.mjs tests/site-url-sync.test.mjs tests/pages-artifact.test.mjs tests/pages-failure-modes.test.mjs tests/npm-command.test.mjs tests/pages-preflight.test.mjs tests/public-site-smoke.test.mjs tests/pages-workflows.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:ts
scripts.check: npm run check:site-url && npm run test:site && cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && npm run validate:toolchain && npm run validate:docs && npm run validate:identity && npm run validate:links && npm run test && npm run build && npm run validate:jsr
